title: Build Product Detail modal or page with add-to-cart integration
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a product opens a modal or navigates to a detail view with full description and price.
Detail view includes quantity selector and Add to Cart button integrated with CartProvider.
Modal closes via close button, overlay click, and Escape key.
Detail view is responsive and accessible (focus trap in modal, aria-labels).
If using a dedicated page, generateStaticParams is used or route is static-export compatible.
No backend data fetching; product resolved from dummy catalog by id.
